about.title: About LetItRip
about.subtitle: India's home for Pokémon TCG, Hot Wheels, Beyblades, anime figures, and every collectible that matters
about.missionText: LetItRip was built by collectors, for collectors. We set out to create India's #1 dedicated marketplace for Pokémon TCG, Yu-Gi-Oh!, Hot Wheels, Beyblades, anime figures, and rare collectibles — a place where passionate hobbyists can buy, sell, and bid without fear of fakes, inflated prices, or shady deals.
about.howBuyersText: Browse verified listings across Pokémon, Hot Wheels, Beyblades, model kits, and more. Every seller is vetted, every graded card is documented. Find the exact card, figure, or die-cast you've been hunting — and buy with confidence.
about.howSellersText: Open your store and reach thousands of active collectors across India. List individual cards, sealed booster boxes, complete sets, or rare vintage pieces. Our seller tools handle inventory, orders, and payouts so you can focus on the hobby.
about.howBiddersText: Join live auctions on PSA-graded cards, first-edition sets, limited-run figures, and retired die-cast models. Set auto-bid limits and let the engine fight for you — every win is final and fully protected.
about.valuesTrustText: Fake listings and counterfeit products have no place here. Our scam registry, seller verification, and community reporting systems keep the marketplace clean and trustworthy.
about.valuesCommunityText: LetItRip is built around the people who live and breathe this hobby. We host tournaments, meetups, and events that bring the community together — online and in person across India.
about.valuesInnovationText: Every feature we ship is shaped by feedback from real collectors. From auction mechanics to grading documentation and scam protection — we build what the community actually needs.
about.milestoneFounded: Launched as India's first dedicated collectibles marketplace — focused on Pokémon TCG, Hot Wheels, and anime figures from day one
about.milestoneAuctions: Introduced real-time auctions with auto-bid support, starting with PSA-graded Pokémon and rare Yu-Gi-Oh! singles
about.milestoneMobile: Expanded into Beyblades, model kits, and vintage die-cast, growing to thousands of verified collector listings

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions governing the use of the LetItRip collectibles marketplace platform, compliant with the IT Act 2000 and Consumer Protection Act 2019.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using LetItRip
terms.contactText: For questions about these terms, contact our legal team at legal@letitrip.in.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using the LetItRip platform (the 'Platform') at letitrip.in, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions, our Privacy Policy, and our Refund Policy. If you do not agree to any of these terms, you must immediately discontinue your use of the Platform. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement under the Information Technology Act, 2000 (as amended in 2008).

sections.heading: 2. Definitions
sections.body: 'Platform' means the LetItRip website and mobile application operated by LetItRip Internet Pvt. Ltd. 'User' means any person who accesses or uses the Platform. 'Seller' means a User who has been approved to list and sell products. 'Buyer' means a User who purchases or bids on products. 'Collectible' means any physical trading card, diecast vehicle, spinning top, model kit, action figure, or similar item listed on the Platform. 'INR' means Indian Rupees.

sections.heading: 3. Eligibility and Account Registration
sections.body: You must be at least 18 years of age to create an account or make a purchase on the Platform. By registering, you represent that you are legally competent to enter into a binding contract under the Indian Contract Act, 1872. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately at support@letitrip.in of any unauthorised use of your account.

sections.heading: 4. Use of the Platform
sections.body: You may use LetItRip solely for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to: post false, misleading, or fraudulent listings; harass, threaten, or defame other Users; attempt to circumvent our payment or authentication systems; use automated scraping tools without written permission; or upload malware or any code that may damage the Platform or other Users' devices. Violations may result in immediate account suspension without refund of any fees paid.

sections.heading: 5. Seller Obligations and Listing Standards
sections.body: Sellers must accurately describe each item's condition (Mint, Near Mint, Lightly Played, etc.), authenticity, and provenance. Graded items (PSA, BGS, CGC) must clearly display the exact grade and slab population data where available. Sellers must ship within the handling time stated in their store profile and provide valid courier tracking. Sellers are solely responsible for any tax obligations arising from their sales, including GST where applicable. LetItRip is not responsible for disputes arising from inaccurate seller descriptions.

sections.heading: 6. Buyer Obligations
sections.body: Buyers must complete payment within 48 hours of a winning auction bid or an accepted offer. Buyers must inspect items promptly upon delivery and raise any disputes within 48 hours using the Platform's dispute resolution tool. Buyers may not engage in bid sniping, shill bidding, or colluding with sellers to manipulate auction outcomes. Buyers who habitually retract bids or fail to complete payment may have their bidding privileges revoked.

sections.heading: 7. Prohibited Items
sections.body: The following items are strictly prohibited on LetItRip: (a) counterfeit or replica trading cards (including unauthorised reprints of Pokémon WOTC-era cards or Yu-Gi-Oh! cards); (b) reproduction vintage diecast vehicles marketed as originals (e.g. replica Hot Wheels Redlines); (c) bootleg or unlicensed anime figures; (d) items that infringe third-party intellectual property rights including Pokémon, Bandai, Hasbro, or Mattel trademarks; (e) weapons, controlled substances, or items prohibited under Indian law. LetItRip reserves the right to remove any listing and permanently ban the seller's account without notice.

sections.heading: 8. Auction Rules and Binding Bids
sections.body: All bids placed on auction listings are legally binding. By placing a bid, you commit to purchasing the item at that price if you win. The highest bid at the close of the auction constitutes a binding purchase agreement. Auto-extend is active by default — if a bid is placed in the final 5 minutes, the auction extends by 5 minutes. Shill bidding (a seller or associate bidding on their own listing to inflate the price) is a violation of these Terms and constitutes unfair trade practice under the Consumer Protection Act, 2019. Confirmed shill bidding results in permanent account suspension.

sections.heading: 9. Payments, Fees, and Payouts
sections.body: All transactions are processed in Indian Rupees (INR) via Razorpay. LetItRip charges sellers a platform commission of 5% (plus 18% GST on the commission) on each completed sale. Payment gateway fees (2.36% per transaction) are also deducted. Buyer payments are held in escrow until delivery confirmation. Seller payouts are processed weekly to the registered bank account or UPI handle. LetItRip does not accept or hold cryptocurrency. All prices displayed on the Platform are inclusive of applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.

sections.heading: 10. Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on the Platform — including the LetItRip logo, UI design, copy, and software — is the property of LetItRip Internet Pvt. Ltd. and is protected under the Copyright Act, 1957. Product images and descriptions uploaded by Sellers remain the property of the respective rights holders. By uploading content, you grant LetItRip a non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to display and use that content for the purpose of operating the Platform. You must not use any third-party trademarks (Pokémon, Hot Wheels, Gundam, etc.) in a way that implies endorsement by those brand owners.

sections.heading: 11. Dispute Resolution
sections.body: Buyers and sellers are encouraged to resolve disputes through the Platform's in-built dispute resolution tool before escalating. If no resolution is reached within 7 days, LetItRip's dispute team will review the case and issue a binding decision. LetItRip's decision regarding platform disputes is final. For disputes outside the Platform's scope, both parties agree to attempt resolution through the National Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission (NCDRC) or a state consumer forum under the Consumer Protection Act, 2019 before resorting to litigation. These Terms are governed by the laws of India.

sections.heading: 12. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: LetItRip is an intermediary under the IT Act, 2000 and is not the seller or buyer of any listed item. LetItRip is not liable for: the accuracy of seller listings; the authenticity of any item; disputes between buyers and sellers; delays or failures in third-party shipping; or any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Platform. LetItRip's maximum aggregate liability for any claim shall not exceed the amount paid by you to LetItRip in the 3 months preceding the claim.

sections.heading: 13. Account Termination and Suspension
sections.body: LetItRip may suspend or terminate your account at any time for violation of these Terms, fraudulent activity, or conduct detrimental to other Users. Sellers whose accounts are terminated forfeit any unpaid payout balance pending for orders that were disputed or cancelled due to the violation. You may close your account at any time by contacting support@letitrip.in; closure does not entitle you to a refund of any commission or fees already charged.

sections.heading: 14. Governing Law and Jurisdiction

privacy.metaDescription: How LetItRip collects, uses, and protects your personal data, in compliance with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act).
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters to us
privacy.introText: LetItRip Internet Pvt. Ltd. ('LetItRip', 'we', 'our', 'us') is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and safeguard your data when you use our platform at letitrip.in, in compliance with the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) and the Information Technology (Reasonable Security Practices and Procedures and Sensitive Personal Data or Information) Rules, 2011.
privacy.intro: LetItRip Internet Pvt. Ltd. ('we', 'our', 'us') is committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use our platform.

sections.heading: 1. Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect: (a) Account data — name, email address, mobile number, and date of birth when you register. (b) Identity verification data — government ID details (Aadhaar number last 4 digits, PAN) for seller KYC. (c) Payment data — bank account details and UPI handles for seller payouts; card/UPI details are processed by Razorpay and not stored by LetItRip. (d) Transaction data — orders placed, bids, wishlists, and offer history. (e) Device and usage data — IP address, browser type, operating system, pages visited, and clickstream data collected automatically via cookies and server logs.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use your personal data to: process orders and facilitate auctions; verify seller identity and prevent fraud; send transactional emails (order confirmation, shipping updates, payout receipts); personalise your browsing experience (recommended listings, recent searches); comply with Indian tax laws (GST filings) and respond to law enforcement requests; and improve platform performance and detect abuse. We do not sell your personal data to third-party advertisers.

sections.heading: 3. Sharing Your Information
sections.body: We share your data only as necessary: (a) Sellers receive your shipping name, delivery address, and phone number for order fulfilment — they are contractually prohibited from using this data for any other purpose. (b) Razorpay receives payment data to process transactions. (c) Courier partners (Delhivery, BlueDart, Speed Post) receive your delivery address and phone number to complete deliveries. (d) We may disclose data to government or regulatory authorities when required by law, court order, or to protect LetItRip's legal rights.

sections.heading: 4. Data Security
sections.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, AES-256 encryption at rest for sensitive fields, Firebase Authentication with multi-factor support, HMAC blind indices for PII search fields, and role-based access controls restricting staff access to personal data. We conduct periodic security audits. While we strive to protect your data, no Internet transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights Under the DPDP Act 2023
sections.body: Under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, you have the right to: (a) Access — request a summary of personal data we hold about you. (b) Correction — request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data. (c) Erasure — request deletion of your personal data ('Right to be Forgotten'), subject to legal retention obligations. (d) Grievance Redressal — raise a complaint via our Data Protection Officer at privacy@letitrip.in, who will respond within 48 hours. (e) Nominate — nominate another individual to exercise these rights on your behalf in the event of your death or incapacity. To exercise any right, email privacy@letitrip.in from your registered email address.

sections.heading: 6. Data Retention
sections.body: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active. After account closure: transactional records (orders, payouts) are retained for 7 years to comply with Indian accounting and GST audit requirements. Identity verification data (KYC) is retained for 5 years post-relationship as required by anti-money-laundering guidelines. Device and usage logs are deleted after 90 days. If you request erasure, we will delete or anonymise your data within 30 days, except where retention is mandated by law.

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies to maintain your session, remember preferences, and analyse platform usage. See our Cookie Policy for a full breakdown of cookie categories and opt-out instructions.

sections.heading: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.body: LetItRip is not intended for users under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe we have inadvertently collected data from a minor, please contact privacy@letitrip.in and we will delete it promptly. Parents or guardians who discover that a child has registered without consent should contact us immediately.

sections.heading: 9. Cross-Border Data Transfers
sections.body: LetItRip primarily stores data on Google Cloud servers located in Mumbai (asia-south1 region). Some third-party services (Firebase, Razorpay analytics, Google Analytics) may process data outside India. We ensure any cross-border transfer is covered by adequate contractual safeguards consistent with the DPDP Act 2023 and applicable rules notified by the Indian government.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by email and via an in-platform notice at least 7 days before the change takes effect. The 'Last updated' date at the top of this page will reflect the most recent revision. Continued use of the Platform after the effective date constitutes your acceptance of the updated Policy.

sections.heading: Contact — Data Protection Officer
sections.body: For privacy-related queries, requests, or complaints, contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@letitrip.in. We aim to respond within 48 hours. If you are not satisfied with our response, you may file a complaint with the Data Protection Board of India (once constituted under the DPDP Act 2023).

securityPage.metaDescription: Learn how LetItRip protects your personal data with encryption at rest, secure transport, and strict access controls.
securityPage.title: Security & Data Protection
securityPage.subtitle: Your data is encrypted, access-controlled, and handled with care at every layer of our platform.
securityPage.overviewText: LetItRip employs a defence-in-depth strategy: every layer — from transport to storage to application logic — is hardened to protect your personal information.
securityPage.encryptionText: All personally identifiable information (PII) — names, emails, phone numbers, addresses — is encrypted with AES-256-GCM before it is written to our database. The encryption key is stored securely in our server environment and is never exposed to client-side code.
securityPage.blindIndexText: To look up records by email or phone without decrypting every row, we use HMAC-SHA256 blind indices. These one-way hashes let the server find your account instantly while keeping the underlying value unreadable at rest.
securityPage.transportText: All connections between your browser and our servers are encrypted with TLS 1.2+ (HTTPS). API calls, form submissions, and file uploads are never transmitted in plain text.
securityPage.dataMinText: We collect only the data necessary to process your orders and provide our services. Public-facing pages such as product listings and auction feeds never expose seller or buyer PII.
securityPage.accessText: Firestore security rules enforce role-based access: only authenticated users can read their own data, and administrative endpoints require verified admin tokens. Server-side repositories are the sole gateway to the database — no direct client queries are permitted.
securityPage.loggingText: Our structured logging system automatically redacts PII fields before writing to logs. Email addresses, phone numbers, and personal names are never stored in plain text in log output.
securityPage.rtdbText: Live auction feeds and bidding activity shown on the site use anonymised identifiers. Your real name or email is never broadcast in real-time channels.
securityPage.uploadsText: All file uploads are staged locally and submitted to the backend via FormData. The server validates MIME types using magic-byte inspection — not just file extensions — to prevent malicious uploads.
securityPage.csrfText: Server Actions validate origin headers, and all user-generated HTML content is sanitised to prevent cross-site scripting (XSS). API routes use rate limiting backed by Redis to mitigate abuse.
securityPage.complianceText: You can access, update, or delete your personal data from your account settings at any time. For data-related queries, contact us at privacy@letitrip.in.
securityPage.ctaText: Read our full privacy policy or contact us directly with any data protection concerns.

cookies.metaDescription: How LetItRip uses cookies and similar tracking technologies, including a full list of cookies by category.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: This Cookie Policy explains how LetItRip uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our platform.
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how LetItRip uses cookies and similar tracking technologies when you visit our platform.
cookies.whatText: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They allow the website to remember information about your visit — such as your login session and cart items — so you do not have to re-enter it on every page. We also use similar technologies like localStorage and sessionStorage for client-side state that does not leave your device.
cookies.typesText: We categorise our cookies into three types: Essential (required for core functionality and cannot be disabled), Analytics (help us understand how visitors use the Platform so we can improve it), and Marketing (used to deliver relevant promotions, currently limited). You can control non-essential cookies from your browser settings.
cookies.essentialText: These cookies are strictly necessary for the Platform to function and cannot be opted out of. Disabling them may break sign-in, checkout, and cart functionality.
cookies.analyticsText: We use Google Analytics 4 to understand aggregate usage patterns — which pages are most visited, where users drop off, and how search results are used. This data is anonymised and never linked to your personal identity.
cookies.marketingText: Marketing cookies help us measure the effectiveness of promotions and show relevant offers. We currently use minimal marketing cookies; future integrations (Google Ads, Meta Pixel) will be listed here before activation.
cookies.controlText: You can refuse or delete non-essential cookies at any time through your browser settings. On Chrome: Settings → Privacy and Security → Cookies. On Safari: Settings → Safari → Privacy. Disabling essential cookies will affect your ability to sign in and complete purchases. You can also clear all LetItRip-related cookies by signing out and clearing site data.
cookies.thirdPartyText: Razorpay (our payment processor) sets cookies during checkout to detect fraud and maintain payment session state. These cookies are governed by Razorpay's Privacy Policy and are only active during the checkout flow.
cookies.changesText: We may update this Cookie Policy as we add new features or third-party integrations. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date, and we will notify you via an in-platform banner if material new cookies are introduced.
cookies.contactText: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at privacy@letitrip.in.

sections.heading: Essential Cookies
sections.body:
• __session (Firebase Auth) — Maintains your signed-in session. Expires on sign-out or after 1 hour of inactivity.
• lir_cart — Stores your cart items for guest checkouts using browser localStorage. Never sent to our servers.
• lir_csrf — Cross-site request forgery protection token. Refreshed on each page load.
• lir_locale — Stores your selected language preference (currently 'en'). Expires after 1 year.

sections.heading: Analytics Cookies
sections.body:
• _ga (Google Analytics 4) — Distinguishes unique visitors. Expires after 2 years.
• _ga_XXXXXX (GA4 session counter) — Tracks session count and engagement. Expires after 2 years.
• _gid — Identifies a user session within 24 hours. Expires after 24 hours.
All analytics data is processed in aggregate. IP addresses are anonymised before storage.

sections.heading: Payment Processor Cookies (Razorpay)
sections.body:
• rzp_checkout_anon_id — Anonymised session ID for fraud detection during checkout. Set only when the Razorpay checkout modal is opened. Expires after 30 days.
• rzp_device_id — Device fingerprint for payment security. Expires after 6 months.
These cookies are set by Razorpay and are governed by Razorpay's Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: Managing Your Preferences
sections.body: To opt out of Google Analytics tracking, install the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on (tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout). To block all third-party cookies, use your browser's privacy settings or a tool like uBlock Origin. Note that blocking essential cookies will prevent sign-in and checkout from working correctly.

refundPolicy.metaDescription: LetItRip's refund, return, and exchange policy for collectibles purchases — including sealed products, graded cards, auctions, and pre-orders.
refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.subtitle: We want every LetItRip purchase to meet your expectations. This policy covers all scenarios specific to the Indian collectibles market.
refundPolicy.intro: We want every LetItRip purchase to meet your expectations. This policy covers all scenarios specific to the Indian collectibles market.
refundPolicy.eligibilityText: Refund eligibility depends on the product type. Please read each section carefully. To initiate a return or refund, log in → My Orders → select the order → 'Request Refund', and provide photos where relevant.
refundPolicy.processText: Log in to your account, go to My Orders, select the relevant order, and tap 'Request Refund'. Select the reason, upload supporting photos (required for damage or authenticity disputes), and submit. Our team will respond within 2 business days.
refundPolicy.timelineText: Approved refunds are processed within 5–7 business days via Razorpay reversal to your original payment method. Bank NEFT refunds may take an additional 2–3 business days. UPI refunds are typically faster (1–2 business days). You will receive an email confirmation when the refund is initiated.
refundPolicy.auctionsText: Auction wins are binding and final. Refunds are only available if: (a) the seller fails to ship within 7 days and does not respond to queries; or (b) the item received differs significantly from the auction description (e.g. a card listed as PSA 9 arrives as PSA 7). Contact support within 48 hours of delivery with photographic evidence.
refundPolicy.exchangesText: We do not offer direct exchanges. To get a different item, request a refund and place a new order. Sellers may offer exchanges at their discretion through buyer-seller messaging.
refundPolicy.shippingText: Buyers are responsible for return shipping costs unless the item arrived damaged, significantly not as described, or was confirmed counterfeit. Use a trackable courier (Speed Post, Delhivery, BlueDart) for all returns. LetItRip is not responsible for return shipments lost in transit without tracking proof.
refundPolicy.nonRefundableText: The following are not eligible for refund: items clearly marked 'Final Sale' or 'As-Is'; items where the buyer acknowledged minor imperfections at the time of purchase; gift cards; and digital codes.
refundPolicy.contactText: If you have questions about this policy or need assistance with a return, contact us via the Help Center or email support@letitrip.in.

sections.heading: 1. Sealed Products (Unopened)
sections.body: Sealed Pokémon ETBs, booster boxes, Beyblade launchers, Gunpla kits, or any factory-sealed collectible may be returned within 7 days of delivery for a full refund, provided the item is returned in its original sealed condition. Any evidence of tampering (resealing, broken factory seal) disqualifies the return. Return shipping is the buyer's responsibility.

sections.heading: 2. Opened or Raw (Ungraded) Items
sections.body: Once opened, raw singles, figures, or diecast vehicles are generally not eligible for return unless the item is materially different from the listing description. 'Materially different' means a card listed as Near Mint (NM) arrives with a significant crease or water damage not disclosed in the listing photos. Minor condition variations within the same grade band are not grounds for a refund. Submit photographic evidence within 48 hours of delivery.

sections.heading: 3. PSA / BGS / CGC Graded Cards
sections.body: Graded slabs are shipped in rigid mailers. If the slab arrives cracked or with internal card movement not visible in the seller's listing photos, raise a dispute within 48 hours with clear photographs. If a card's actual PSA grade is lower than the grade stated in the listing (e.g. listed as PSA 9 but slab clearly shows PSA 7), the seller must offer a full refund including return shipping. LetItRip will adjudicate if seller and buyer cannot agree.

sections.heading: 4. Auction Wins
sections.body: All auction bids are binding. Auction wins are non-refundable except in two scenarios: (a) The seller does not ship within 7 days and cannot be reached — LetItRip will issue a full refund and suspend the seller. (b) The item received differs significantly from the auction listing (wrong card, wrong grade, undisclosed damage) — raise a dispute within 48 hours with photos. We strongly recommend buyers screenshot auction photos before bidding.

sections.heading: 5. Pre-Order Cancellations
sections.body: Pre-orders can be cancelled for a full refund at any time before the seller marks the order as 'Dispatched'. Once dispatched, pre-orders follow the standard refund policy. If a seller is unable to fulfil a pre-order (e.g. delayed restock, import ban), buyers will receive a full refund automatically. Sellers who cancel pre-orders after accepting payment without valid reason may face penalties.

sections.heading: 6. Disputed Authenticity
sections.body: If you believe a card or collectible is counterfeit (a Pokémon card that fails the light or rip test, a Hot Wheels Redline with incorrect paint or casting), raise an authenticity dispute within 7 days of delivery. Submit clear macro photographs and, where possible, a side-by-side comparison with a known authentic item. LetItRip reserves the right to request the item be sent to a third-party authenticator. Confirmed counterfeits result in a full refund and the seller's account is permanently suspended.

sections.heading: 7. Damaged in Transit
sections.body: If your item arrives damaged due to carrier mishandling (crushed box, water damage), photograph the damage and the outer packaging within 48 hours of delivery. Raise a transit damage dispute via My Orders. LetItRip will investigate with the seller and courier. Where the damage is clearly the carrier's fault and the seller packed appropriately, LetItRip's courier claims process applies and a refund may be issued pending carrier investigation. Do not discard damaged packaging — it is required for courier claims.

sections.heading: 8. Return Shipping & Timelines
sections.body: Buyer-initiated returns: buyer pays return shipping (except confirmed counterfeit or seller error). Use a trackable service — LetItRip is not liable for returns lost in transit without a tracking number. Once the seller confirms receipt of the return in original condition, the refund is initiated within 48 hours. Approved refunds credit to your original payment method within 5–7 business days via Razorpay. UPI refunds typically arrive within 1–2 business days; NEFT may take 3–5 business days.

sellerGuide.metaDescription: Everything you need to know to succeed as a collectibles seller on LetItRip — from listing Pokémon cards and Gunpla kits to running live auctions and getting paid.
sellerGuide.title: Seller Guide
sellerGuide.subtitle: Your step-by-step guide to opening a store, listing collectibles, running auctions, and growing your business on LetItRip.
sellerGuide.gettingStartedText: Create your LetItRip account, submit a store application, and complete your store profile with a logo, banner, and description. Verification typically takes 24 hours. Once approved, you can list products immediately. We recommend setting up shipping zones and payout details before your first listing so buyers can check out without friction.
sellerGuide.listingText: Great listings win trust and rank higher in search. For Pokémon TCG: state the set name, card number (e.g. 108/102), condition (PSA 9, NM, LP), and whether the card is raw or graded. For Hot Wheels: include the casting name, year, colour, and any tampo details — vintage Redlines especially benefit from close-up wheel photos. For Gunpla kits: note the grade (HG/MG/PG/RG), whether the kit is built or unbuilt, and include photos of sprues for unbuilt kits. Upload at least 4 photos per listing — front, back, close-up of any defects, and scale comparison where relevant.
sellerGuide.pricingText: Check recent sold listings on LetItRip and comparable platforms to anchor your prices. For raw Pokémon singles, reference TCGPlayer market price and adjust for Indian import premium (typically +15–25%). For PSA/BGS graded cards, the pop report size strongly influences value — lower pops command higher prices. Hot Wheels mainline cards sell at ₹100–₹200; premium and super treasures trade at ₹500–₹2,000. Beyblades: sealed boosters fetch 2–3× the standard retail price in the secondary market. Always price in INR; LetItRip handles GST compliance at checkout.
sellerGuide.auctionsText: Auctions are ideal for rare or highly sought-after pieces — PSA 10 Charizard 1st Edition, vintage Hot Wheels Redlines, sealed first-edition Pokémon Base Set packs. Set a starting bid low enough to generate early interest; the reserve protects you if bidding falls short. Enable auto-extend (on by default) so last-minute sniping does not shortchange you. Promote your auction via our homepage auction section and notify your followers. After the auction closes, the winning bidder has 48 hours to pay — if they do not, you can relist or offer a Second Chance to the next highest bidder.
sellerGuide.ordersText: When a buyer places an order, you receive an email and an in-platform notification. Ship within your stated handling time — default is 2 business days. For high-value items (above ₹2,000), use Speed Post or a courier with door-to-door tracking (Delhivery, BlueDart, Ecom Express). Always pack graded slabs in a rigid box with foam or bubble wrap — PSA cases crack easily in transit. Enter the tracking number in Seller Dashboard → Orders so the buyer can follow delivery. Mark the order as shipped once the tracking is live.
sellerGuide.paymentsText: All buyer payments are collected securely via Razorpay (UPI, Net Banking, Credit/Debit card, COD). Funds are held in escrow until delivery is confirmed or the 10-day window expires. Your payout balance updates automatically. Payouts are processed every Monday to your registered bank account (NEFT) or UPI handle. Minimum payout threshold is ₹500 — balances below this carry over. NEFT arrives within 1–2 business days; UPI is typically same-day. Your earnings breakdown, deductions, and payout history are all visible in Seller Dashboard → Payouts.
sellerGuide.policiesText: LetItRip enforces a strict authenticity policy. Never list counterfeit Pokémon cards (WOTC-era fakes are common — learn to identify them), bootleg Gunpla, or reproduction Hot Wheels marketed as originals. Misrepresentation results in immediate listing removal, and repeat violations lead to account suspension. Respond to buyer questions within 48 hours. Honor your stated return window — LetItRip buyers expect the same standards as any reputable collector-to-collector trade. Sellers with a seller rating below 4.0 may be placed on a performance improvement plan.
sellerGuide.supportText: Our seller support team is available via the Help Center (Monday–Saturday, 10am–6pm IST). For urgent issues — a buyer dispute, a missing shipment, or a counterfeit complaint — use the Priority Support option in your Seller Dashboard. A dedicated account manager is assigned once you reach the Verified Seller tier. Community advice is also available in our LetItRip Collectors Discord and seller WhatsApp group (invitation sent on approval).

requirements.title: Who Can Sell on LetItRip
requirements.intro: LetItRip is a curated marketplace for genuine collectibles. To qualify as a seller:
points: You must be 18 years or older with a valid Indian ID (Aadhaar, PAN, or Passport).
You must have an active Indian bank account (NEFT/RTGS) or UPI handle for payouts.
All items must be authentic — no knockoffs, counterfeits, or reproduction vintage items.
Sellers dealing in graded cards must clearly indicate the grading company (PSA, BGS, CGC) and grade.
You agree to ship within the handling time stated in your store settings.

howItWorks.title: How LetItRip Works
howItWorks.intro: LetItRip connects collectors and enthusiasts across India. Here is what the platform does for you:
points: Buyers discover your listings through search, homepage sections, and curated category pages.
You manage your own listings, prices, and inventory from your Seller Dashboard.
All payments are processed securely via Razorpay — funds are held in escrow until delivery.
You get a dedicated store page with your logo, banner, policies, and reviews.
Auction listings let serious collectors bid on rare items like 1st-Edition Pokémon cards or vintage Hot Wheels.

whatYouCanSell.title: What You Can Sell
whatYouCanSell.intro: LetItRip is built for the Indian collectibles community. Popular categories include:
points: Trading Cards — Pokémon TCG (sealed ETBs, booster packs, singles, slabs), Yu-Gi-Oh!, Dragon Ball Super Card Game.
Diecast Vehicles — Hot Wheels (mainline, premium, vintage Redlines), Tomica, Matchbox, majorette.
Spinning Tops — Beyblade Burst, Beyblade X, Metal Fight — sealed or used.
Model Kits — Bandai Gunpla (MG, PG, HG, RG), Dragon Ball, Evangelion model kits.
Action Figures — McFarlane, Funko POP!, NECA, Good Smile Company figmas and nendos.
Vintage & Rare — Pre-2000 Pokémon Base Set cards, vintage Star Wars figures, original Hot Wheels Redlines.
Prohibited: counterfeit cards, replica/bootleg figures, any item misrepresented as official.

fees.title: Fees & Commission
fees.intro: LetItRip keeps fees simple and transparent. There are no hidden charges:
points: 5% platform commission on every completed sale (deducted automatically before payout).
GST at 18% is charged on the commission amount as required by Indian tax law.
No monthly subscription, no listing fee, no setup fee — you pay only when you sell.
Razorpay payment gateway fee (2.36% + GST) is deducted on the transaction amount.
On a ₹1,000 sale you receive ₹917.40. Use the earnings calculator above.
Refunded or cancelled orders before dispatch are not charged commission.

auctions.title: Auction Listings
auctions.intro: LetItRip auctions are designed for rare and high-demand collectibles:
points: Set a starting bid (minimum ₹100) and an optional secret reserve price.
Choose a duration between 1 and 14 days — shorter auctions create more urgency.
Auto-extend: if a bid is placed in the final 5 minutes, the auction extends by 5 minutes to prevent sniping.
The winning bidder is notified instantly and has 48 hours to complete payment.
Shill bidding, bid retraction, and bid manipulation are strictly prohibited and result in account suspension.
Ideal for: PSA/BGS graded Pokémon slabs, vintage Hot Wheels Redlines, sealed first-edition sets.

earnings.title: Your Earnings & Payouts
earnings.intro: Understanding your payout schedule and how earnings are calculated:
points: Earnings are held in escrow during the order delivery window (typically 5–10 days).
Once the buyer confirms delivery (or the window expires), funds are released to your payout balance.
Payouts are processed weekly every Monday to your registered bank account or UPI handle.
Minimum payout threshold: ₹500. Balances below this carry over to the next week.
NEFT transfers arrive within 1–2 business days; UPI payouts are typically same-day.
Your full payout history and pending balance are visible in Seller Dashboard → Payouts.

responsibilities.title: Seller Responsibilities
responsibilities.intro: As a seller on LetItRip, you agree to the following obligations:
points: Ship orders within your stated handling time (default 2 business days) and provide valid tracking.
Respond to buyer messages and queries within 48 hours.
Accurately describe condition (Mint, Near Mint, Played, etc.) and authenticity of every item.
Accept returns for items that arrive damaged, significantly not as described, or are confirmed counterfeit.
Keep listings up-to-date — mark items as sold or archived if no longer available.
Comply with all Indian laws including GST obligations if your annual turnover exceeds ₹20 lakh.

tiers.title: Seller Tiers & Growth
tiers.intro: LetItRip rewards high-performing sellers with tiered benefits:
points: Basic Seller (up to ₹25,000/month): Standard commission, full platform access.
Verified Seller (₹25,001–₹1,00,000/month): Verified badge, priority support, improved search ranking.
Power Seller (above ₹1,00,000/month): Reduced commission, dedicated account manager, homepage promotion eligibility.
Tiers are evaluated monthly based on completed sales in the previous 30 days.
Tier badges are shown on your public store profile and on your product cards.

howAuctionsWork.metaDescription: Learn how LetItRip live auctions work — from placing bids to winning and receiving your item.
howAuctionsWork.title: How Auctions Work
howAuctionsWork.subtitle: LetItRip auctions are open, competitive, and real-time. Here's everything you need to know to participate and win.
howAuctionsWork.step1Text: Browse active auctions on the Auctions page. Each listing shows the current bid, time remaining, bid count, and whether the seller's reserve price has been met.
howAuctionsWork.step2Text: Before bidding, review the minimum bid amount, reserve price indicator, and auction end time. Check the seller's reputation and item condition notes.
howAuctionsWork.step3Text: Enter a bid amount above the current minimum. Watch the countdown and you will be notified if you are outbid.
howAuctionsWork.step4Text: When the auction ends and you hold the highest bid, you have 48 hours to complete payment. If you do not pay within 3 days your bid will be forfeited.
howAuctionsWork.step5Text: When someone places a higher bid you are instantly notified. You are free to bid again or move on to the next auction.
howAuctionsWork.step6Text: After successful payment the seller ships the item within their stated handling time. Track your shipment from the Orders page. Inspect the item on arrival and contact support if anything is wrong.
howAuctionsWork.reservePriceText: Some auctions have a hidden reserve price set by the seller. If the final bid does not meet the reserve, the item is not sold. You will see '⚠ Reserve not met' if the current bid is below the reserve.
howAuctionsWork.autoExtendText: If a bid is placed in the final minutes of an auction the timer may extend by a few minutes. This prevents last-second sniping and gives every bidder a fair chance.
howAuctionsWork.ctaText: Find your next treasure and start bidding on thousands of unique items.
howAuctionsWork.diagramTitle: The auction journey — at a glance
howAuctionsWork.diagramStatusNote: What you might see while an auction is running:
howAuctionsWork.diagramWinningDesc: Your bid is the highest right now. Stay sharp — anyone can outbid you before time runs out.
howAuctionsWork.diagramOutbidDesc: Someone placed a higher bid. You can bid again right away!
howAuctionsWork.diagramForfeitDesc: You won but missed the 3-day payment window. Always pay promptly after winning.

howPreOrdersWork.metaDescription: Discover how LetItRip pre-orders work — reserve upcoming products before they arrive and never miss a launch.
howPreOrdersWork.title: How Pre-Orders Work
howPreOrdersWork.subtitle: Pre-orders let you reserve products before they are in stock. Secure your item early so you never miss a launch.
howPreOrdersWork.step1Text: Browse pre-order listings on the Pre-Orders page. Each listing includes the expected release date, the price, production status, and how many spots remain.
howPreOrdersWork.step2Text: Click 'Reserve Now' and complete checkout. Depending on the seller's configuration, you pay a deposit (typically 20–50%) or the full price upfront. Your order is confirmed instantly.
howPreOrdersWork.step3Text: The seller sources, manufactures, or imports the product. You can track the production status ('Upcoming', 'In Production', 'Ready to Ship') directly on the listing.
howPreOrdersWork.step4Text: On or around the expected release date the seller dispatches your item. You'll receive a notification with your tracking number once it ships.
howPreOrdersWork.step5Text: Your pre-ordered item arrives at your door. If there are any delays, the seller or LetItRip support will notify you via email and in-app notification.
howPreOrdersWork.cancellationText: You can cancel a pre-order before it is dispatched and receive a full refund. Once the item has shipped, standard refund and return policies apply. Deposits may be non-refundable after production begins — check the individual listing.
howPreOrdersWork.sellerDelayTitle: What If the Seller Is Delayed?
howPreOrdersWork.sellerDelayText: If a seller cannot fulfil a pre-order, affected buyers are automatically refunded in full. LetItRip monitors pre-order fulfilment closely and takes action against sellers who repeatedly fail to deliver.
howPreOrdersWork.priceLockText: The price you pay at the time of your pre-order is locked in. If the seller reduces the price before dispatch you will automatically receive the difference as store credit.
howPreOrdersWork.ctaText: Reserve upcoming products now and be the first to receive them.
howPreOrdersWork.diagramTitle: Pre-order status — what you’ll see at each stage
howPreOrdersWork.diagramStatus1Desc: Listing is open. Reserve your spot!
howPreOrdersWork.infoCard1Text: You can cancel a pre-order before it is dispatched and receive a full refund. Once the item has shipped, standard refund and return policies apply. Deposits may be non-refundable after production begins — check the individual listing.
howPreOrdersWork.infoCard2Title: What If the Seller Is Delayed?
howPreOrdersWork.infoCard2Text: If a seller cannot fulfil a pre-order, affected buyers are automatically refunded in full. LetItRip monitors pre-order fulfilment closely and takes action against sellers who repeatedly fail to deliver.
howPreOrdersWork.infoCard3Text: The price you pay at the time of your pre-order is locked in. If the seller reduces the price before dispatch you will automatically receive the difference as store credit.
howPreOrdersWork.infoCard4Text: When placing a pre-order, a deposit (typically 20–50% of the total) may be collected upfront. The remaining balance is charged before dispatch. Non-refundable deposit conditions are clearly stated on each listing — review them before reserving.

shippingPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about LetItRip's order process, shipping timelines, costs, and how to track your shipment.
shippingPolicy.title: Shipping Policy
shippingPolicy.subtitle: We want your orders to arrive quickly and safely. Here is how our shipping and order fulfilment process works.
shippingPolicy.orderProcessText: Once you complete checkout your order is confirmed and the seller is immediately notified. The seller must prepare and dispatch the item within their stated handling time, usually 1–2 business days.
shippingPolicy.standardText: Standard shipping typically takes 5–7 business days across India. Shipping costs vary by seller and item weight and are displayed clearly at checkout before you pay.
shippingPolicy.expressText: Express delivery (2–3 business days) is available for eligible products. Additional charges apply. Select 'Express' at checkout where the option is displayed.
shippingPolicy.freeShippingText: Many sellers offer free shipping on their listings. Look for the 'Free Shipping' badge on product and auction listings. Free shipping orders follow the same timeline as standard shipping.
shippingPolicy.auctionShippingText: For auction wins, shipping costs and which party pays (buyer or seller) are clearly stated on the auction listing page. Review shipping terms before bidding. Shipping is arranged after successful payment.
shippingPolicy.trackingText: Once your order is dispatched you will receive a tracking number by email and in-app notification. Use the Track Order page to monitor your shipment in real time.
shippingPolicy.internationalText: LetItRip currently ships within India only. International shipping is not supported at this time. Stay tuned for announcements.
shippingPolicy.damagedText: If your order arrives damaged or is lost in transit, contact LetItRip Support immediately with your order ID and photographs. We will investigate and arrange a replacement or refund as appropriate.
shippingPolicy.diagramNote: You’ll see these statuses under ‘My Orders’
shippingPolicy.contactText: Our support team is happy to help. Use the Help Center or Contact page to reach us.

howOffersWork.metaDescription: Learn how to make offers on LetItRip — negotiate directly with sellers and get your item at the price you want.
howOffersWork.title: How Offers Work
howOffersWork.subtitle: Make offers on any product and negotiate directly with the seller. Here's everything you need to know.
howOffersWork.step1Text: Browse listings on the Products or Stores page. Products that support offers will show a 'Make an Offer' button on the listing page.
howOffersWork.step2Text: Look for the "Make an Offer" button on the product page. Not all listings accept offers — it depends on whether the seller has enabled the feature.
howOffersWork.step3Text: Enter your desired price and submit your offer. You can withdraw at any time before the seller responds.
howOffersWork.step4Text: The seller can accept, decline, or send a counter offer within 48 hours. If they counter, you can accept, withdraw, or send your own counter back — your counter must be within 20% (above or below) of the seller's price.
howOffersWork.step5Text: Once an offer is accepted you'll see a 'Checkout Now' button in your Offers page. Add the item to cart at the agreed price and complete payment.
howOffersWork.step6Text: After payment the seller ships within their handling time. Track your shipment from the Orders page. If anything is wrong, contact support immediately.
howOffersWork.rulesItem1: Your counter offer must be within 20% above or below the seller's counter price.
howOffersWork.rulesItem2: You can place up to 3 offers per product. The limit resets automatically if the seller updates the listing.
howOffersWork.rulesItem3: Only one active offer per product at a time. Withdraw your existing offer before making a new one.
howOffersWork.ctaText: Start making offers on thousands of products today.
howOffersWork.rule1: Your counter offer must be within 20% above or below the seller's counter price.
howOffersWork.rule2: You can place up to 3 offers per product. The limit resets if the seller updates the listing.
howOffersWork.rule3: Only one active offer per product at a time. Withdraw your existing offer before making a new one.
howOffersWork.rule4: Offers expire after 48 hours if the seller does not respond.
howOffersWork.rule5: Accepted offers are binding — complete checkout promptly or the offer may be voided.

howCheckoutWorks.metaDescription: Learn how to complete your purchase on LetItRip — from cart to confirmation. Razorpay and COD explained.
howCheckoutWorks.title: How Checkout Works
howCheckoutWorks.subtitle: Placing an order on LetItRip is fast, secure, and flexible. Here is a step-by-step guide to completing your purchase.
howCheckoutWorks.step1Text: Add products to your cart by clicking 'Add to Cart' on any listing. Adjust quantities, apply a coupon code, and review your cart total before proceeding.
howCheckoutWorks.step2Text: Select a saved address or add a new delivery address. If you're shipping to someone else, you'll need to verify consent via a one-time email OTP before proceeding.
howCheckoutWorks.step3Text: Choose from Razorpay (cards, UPI, netbanking) or Cash on Delivery.
howCheckoutWorks.step4Text: Review your full order summary — items, quantities, coupon savings, shipping cost, and total. Click 'Place Order' to confirm.
howCheckoutWorks.step5Text: You'll receive an email and in-app notification confirming your order. Track your shipment from the My Orders page.
howCheckoutWorks.diagramTitle: The checkout journey — at a glance
howCheckoutWorks.paymentMethodsSubtitle: Choose the payment option that works best for you.
howCheckoutWorks.pm1Text: Pay securely with credit/debit card, UPI, or netbanking. Processed by Razorpay — PCI-DSS compliant. Your payment information is never stored on our servers.
howCheckoutWorks.pm2Text: Pay in cash when your order arrives. A one-time OTP confirmation is required when placing a COD order to protect against fraudulent orders.
howCheckoutWorks.ctaText: Browse thousands of products and complete your first checkout in minutes.

howOrdersWork.metaDescription: Understand order statuses, shipment tracking, cancellations, and invoices on LetItRip.
howOrdersWork.title: How Orders Work
howOrdersWork.subtitle: Every order on LetItRip moves through a clear, transparent lifecycle. Here's what each status means and what you can do at each stage.
howOrdersWork.lifecycleSubtitle: Your order progresses through these stages from placement to completion.
howOrdersWork.s1Desc: Your order has been created but payment has not yet been captured. This status applies immediately after placing an order. It resolves automatically once payment is confirmed.
howOrdersWork.s2Desc: Payment was successful. The seller has been notified and will begin processing your order. You'll receive an email and in-app notification.
howOrdersWork.s3Desc: The seller is preparing your items for dispatch — picking, packing, and getting the package ready to hand over to the courier.
howOrdersWork.s4Desc: Your order is on its way! An AWB tracking number has been assigned by the courier. Visit 'Track Order' to follow live shipment updates.
howOrdersWork.s5Desc: The courier has delivered your order. Please inspect your items upon arrival and contact support if anything is damaged or missing.
howOrdersWork.s6Desc: The return window has closed and the order is fully complete.
howOrdersWork.sCancelDesc: The order was cancelled by you or an admin. If payment was made, a refund will be initiated.
howOrdersWork.diagramTitle: Order status flow — from placement to completion
howOrdersWork.trackingText: Once your order is shipped, a tracking link appears on the Order Detail page under 'Track Shipment'. Tracking updates are provided by the courier in real-time.
howOrdersWork.cancelText: You can cancel an order while it is in 'Pending Payment' or 'Confirmed' status. Once the seller starts processing (status moves to 'Processing'), cancellations are no longer available through the platform — contact support.
howOrdersWork.invoiceText: A PDF invoice is available for every completed or delivered order. Open the Order Detail page and click 'Download Invoice'. The invoice includes a breakdown of items, taxes, and payment details.
howOrdersWork.addressText: The delivery address is locked once an order reaches 'Confirmed' status. If you need to change it earlier, cancel the order and re-place it with the correct address.
howOrdersWork.ctaText: Browse thousands of products across all categories and place your first order today.
howOrdersWork.statusPendingDesc: Your order has been created but payment has not yet been captured. It resolves automatically once payment is confirmed.
howOrdersWork.statusConfirmedDesc: Payment was successful. The seller has been notified and will begin processing your order.
howOrdersWork.statusPackedDesc: The seller is preparing your items for dispatch — picking, packing, and getting the package ready for the courier.
howOrdersWork.statusShippedDesc: Your order is on its way! A tracking number has been assigned. Visit Track Order for live shipment updates.
howOrdersWork.statusOutForDeliveryDesc: Your package is with the courier and will be delivered today.

howOrdersWork.statusCancelledDesc: The order was cancelled. If payment was made, a refund will be initiated.

howOrdersWork.infoCard3Text: A PDF invoice is available for every completed or delivered order. Open the Order Detail page and click Download Invoice.
howOrdersWork.infoCard4Text: You can cancel while the order is in Pending Payment or Confirmed status. Once processing starts, contact support.

howReviewsWork.metaDescription: Learn how to write a verified product review on LetItRip and help other shoppers make informed decisions.
howReviewsWork.title: How Reviews Work
howReviewsWork.subtitle: Your opinion matters. LetItRip reviews are from verified buyers — keeping ratings honest and trustworthy for everyone.
howReviewsWork.step1Text: Only users with at least one delivered order containing the product can write a review. This ensures every review is from a genuine buyer — no fake or incentivised reviews.
howReviewsWork.step2Text: Go to the product detail page and click 'Write a Review' in the Reviews tab. A modal will open with a star rating selector, title field, and a text area for your experience.
howReviewsWork.step3Text: After submitting, your review enters 'Pending' status. It is visible to you and the admin team while under review. Moderation typically takes up to 24 hours.
howReviewsWork.step4Text: Once approved by our moderation team, your review appears publicly on the product page. Other shoppers can read it and mark it as helpful.
howReviewsWork.verifiedText: Reviews that link to a confirmed delivered order display a 'Verified Purchase' badge. This badge signals to other buyers that the reviewer actually owns the product.
howReviewsWork.votesText: Any signed-in user can vote a review as 'Helpful' or 'Unhelpful'. Reviews with more helpful votes are ranked higher on the product page so the most useful feedback is easy to find.
howReviewsWork.editText: You can edit your review within 30 days of posting it. Editing resets the review back to 'Pending' status — it goes through moderation again before being re-published.
howReviewsWork.ctaText: Already bought something? Head to your orders and leave a review to help fellow shoppers.

howPayoutsWork.metaDescription: Everything sellers need to know about requesting, tracking, and receiving payouts on LetItRip.
howPayoutsWork.title: How Payouts Work
howPayoutsWork.subtitle: Once your orders are delivered and settled, requesting your earnings is straightforward. Here's the complete payout process.
howPayoutsWork.step1Text: Before you can request a payout, add your bank account details in Seller Dashboard → Payout Settings. Enter your account holder name, bank name, branch, IFSC code, and account number.
howPayoutsWork.step2Text: Payouts are only available for orders that have been delivered and confirmed. Ship orders promptly and ensure the courier updates delivery status so your earnings settle quickly.
howPayoutsWork.step3Text: In the Payouts section of your Seller Dashboard, select the delivered orders you want to include in a payout request. The total must meet the minimum threshold of ₹500.
howPayoutsWork.step4Text: Our team reviews each payout request to verify order statuses and confirm that the earnings are ready for release. This usually takes 1–3 business days.
howPayoutsWork.step5Text: Once approved, the net payout amount (after platform commission) is transferred to your registered bank account via NEFT / UPI. You'll receive an in-app and email notification.
howPayoutsWork.diagramNote: Platform commission is automatically deducted before funds are released.
howPayoutsWork.bankSetupText: You cannot request a payout until your bank account details are saved in Payout Settings. Go to Seller Dashboard → Payout Settings to add your account before making your first request.
howPayoutsWork.minimumText: Each payout request must total at least ₹500. If your pending earnings are below this threshold, accumulate more delivered orders before requesting. There is no maximum limit.
howPayoutsWork.commissionText: LetItRip's commission is automatically deducted from your gross earnings before the payout is processed. The exact deduction is shown in the payout preview on the request screen.
howPayoutsWork.rejectionText: If a payout request is rejected, you will receive a notification with the reason. Common reasons include unverified bank details or disputed orders. Resolve the issue and resubmit from the Payouts section.
howPayoutsWork.infoCard1Text: You cannot request a payout until your bank account details are saved in Payout Settings. Go to Seller Dashboard → Payout Settings to add your account before making your first request.

items.question: What is LetItRip?
items.answer: LetItRip is India's curated multi-seller marketplace for Pokémon TCG cards and collectibles. Browse thousands of singles, sealed products, and PSA/BGS graded cards from verified sellers. You can also participate in live auctions to win rare items.

items.question: Is LetItRip only for Pokémon cards?
items.answer: No — LetItRip covers Pokémon TCG, Hot Wheels diecast, Beyblade Burst, Transformers, Anime Figures, Retro Gaming, and Cosplay accessories.

items.question: How do I buy on LetItRip?
items.answer: Browse products or auctions, add items to your cart or place a bid, then checkout securely with UPI, cards, or EMI via Razorpay. You need to create a free account to purchase.

items.question: Are sellers verified?
items.answer: Yes. All sellers go through a KYC verification process before listing products. You can see a seller's ratings, reviews, and transaction history on their store page.

items.question: What payment methods are accepted?
items.answer: We accept UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm), credit/debit cards, net banking, and EMI via Razorpay. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

items.question: Can I use a coupon code?
items.answer: Yes! Enter your coupon code at checkout. Coupons apply to the order subtotal. Each coupon has its own usage limit and expiry — check your account for active offers.

items.question: How do I track my order?
items.answer: After your order ships, you will receive a tracking number via email and SMS. You can also track it from your account under My Orders.

items.question: Is GST included in the price?
items.answer: Prices shown on LetItRip are inclusive of GST where applicable. Your invoice will show the GST breakdown. A GST invoice is available for all orders.

items.question: How long does delivery take?
items.answer: Delivery time depends on the seller's location and your pin code. Most orders ship within 1–3 business days and are delivered within 5–10 business days pan-India.

items.question: Do sellers ship across India?
items.answer: Yes, all verified sellers on LetItRip ship pan-India. Remote pin codes may have longer delivery windows. Check the product listing for seller-specific shipping details.

items.question: How are fragile collectibles packaged?
items.answer: Cards ship in top-loaders and bubble-wrapped envelopes. Figures and toys are packed in foam-lined boxes. Graded slabs ship in padded rigid mailers. All orders are fully tracked.

items.question: What is the return policy?
items.answer: Returns are managed by each seller individually. Most sellers offer a 7-day return window for items that are not as described. Check the store's return policy on their storefront page before purchasing.

items.question: What if I receive a fake or damaged item?
items.answer: Contact us immediately with photos. Fake items are eligible for a full refund and the seller account is reviewed. Use the Report Item button on your order page.

items.question: Are graded cards authentic?
items.answer: Yes. All PSA, BGS, and CGC graded cards listed on LetItRip come with their original slab. We verify the certification number against the grading company's database before approval.

items.question: What condition grades are used?
items.answer: We use standard TCG grading: Mint (M), Near Mint (NM), Lightly Played (LP), Moderately Played (MP), Heavily Played (HP), and Damaged (D). Graded slabs use the official PSA/BGS/CGC numeric scale.

items.question: How do I reset my password?
items.answer: Click Forgot Password on the login page and enter your email. You will receive a reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

items.question: How do I become a seller?
items.answer: Go to your account and click Open a Store. Complete the KYC verification form with your PAN and bank details. Once approved (usually within 24 hours), you can start listing products.

items.question: The website isn't loading properly. What should I do?
items.answer: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, or use an incognito window. If the issue persists, try a different browser or device. Contact support if the problem continues.

items.question: I'm not receiving OTP for verification. What should I do?
items.answer: Check that your phone number is entered correctly with the +91 country code. OTPs expire in 60 seconds — request a new one if it expires. Contact support if you still don't receive it.
